invariant_definition: The second stage of *śravaṇa-manana-nididhyāsana*: reflective thinking on what has been heard, removing doubts (*saṃśayas*) by *yukti* (reasoning) consistent with *śruti*. All Vedāntic schools accept *manana* as the doubt-removal stage; the differences reduce to those flagged under *śravaṇa*.

per_school.definition: *Manana* is the application of *yukti* (reasoning) consistent with *śruti* to remove doubts about what has been heard. Distinct from independent reasoning (*tarka*-alone), which Advaita explicitly limits.
